source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/01_HAD1717MC, MG/03_설계개발 출력/02_CCL 및 승인원/승인원/기구/환경자료/휴켐/STG-3040 MSDS (SV28GN60B).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Material Safety Data Sheet for STG-3040 thermal conduction silicone manufactured by Silicone Valley Co.,Ltd.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports safety, handling, storage, emergency response, disposal, transport, and regulatory reference information for STG-3040.
keyPoints: Product Name : STG-3040; Product Use : Thermal Conduction Silicone.
Composition lists siloxanes and silicones, aluminum oxide, platinum compound, and trade secret component S1.
Hazard identification states uncured product contact may irritate lips, gums, tongue, eyes, and skin.
Handling guidance says to avoid skin and eye contact and use in a well ventilated area.
Regulatory information lists Waste Law : Plastics and several Korean and external law entries as NA.

entities.name: Silicone Valley Co.Ltd
entities.evidence: Manufactured by : 1) Company : Silicone Valley Co.Ltd

entities.name: SILOXANES AND SILICONES, DI-ME, VINYL GROUP TERMINATED
entities.evidence: SILOXANES AND SILICONES, DI-ME, VINYL GROUP TERMINATED 68083-19-2 7~15

evidence.claim: The document is a Material Safety Data Sheet for product STG-3040.
evidence.evidenceText: MATERIAL SAFETY DATA SHEETs Revise No. : 0(Revise Date : 2011.07.12) Product Name : STG-3040 MSDS No. : RI-0133

evidence.claim: The MSDS revision number is 0 and the revise date is 2011.07.12.
The first prepared date and last prepared date are both 2011.07.12.
evidence.evidenceText: 1.6.1 First Prepared Date : 2011.07.12 1.6.2 Last Prepared Date : 2011.07.12

evidence.claim: STG-3040 is identified as an adhesive used as thermal conduction silicone.
evidence.evidenceText: 1.2 General : adhesives 1.4 Product Use : Thermal Conduction Silicone

evidence.claim: The product is manufactured by Silicone Valley Co.Ltd in Gim cheon-si, Kyung buk-do, Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufactured by : 1) Company : Silicone Valley Co.Ltd 2) Address : 1016-1,Eung Myung, Gim cheon-si, Kyung buk-do, Korea

evidence.claim: The listed composition includes siloxanes and silicones 7~15%, aluminum oxide 85~93%, platinum compound 0.01~3%, and trade secret S1.
evidence.evidenceText: SILOXANES AND SILICONES, DI-ME, VINYL GROUP TERMINATED 68083-19-2 7~15 Aluminum oxide 1344-28-1 85~93 Platinum Compound 68585-32-0 0.01~3 S1 (Trade secret) (Trade secret) (Trade secret)

evidence.claim: Sulfur is not included in the product.
The emergency overview says uncured product contact irritates lips, gums, and tongue, and the product should be used only in a well ventilated area.
evidence.evidenceText: 3.1 Emergency Overview 1) Uncured product contact will irritate lips, gums and tongue. 2) Use only in well ventilated area.

evidence.claim: NFPA ratings are Flammability 0, Reactivity 0, and Health 0.
The MSDS states carcinogenicity listings are No for KISA, OSHA, NTP, and IARC.
evidence.evidenceText: 3.6 Carcinogenicity 1) KISA : No 2) OSHA : No 3) NTP : No 4) IARC : No

evidence.claim: Recommended eye first aid is immediate flushing with water for at least 15 minutes and medical attention if irritation persists.
evidence.evidenceText: In case of contact, immediately flush eyes with plenty of water for at least 15 minutes and get medical attention if irritation persists.

evidence.claim: Handling guidance says to avoid contact with skin and eyes and use in a well ventilated area to avoid breathing vapor.
evidence.evidenceText: 7.1 Handling Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Use in a well ventilated area to avoid breathing vapor.

evidence.claim: Storage guidance says to keep the container closed when not in use and store in a dark, cool place.
evidence.evidenceText: 7.2 Storage Keep container closed when not in use. Store in a dark, cool place.

evidence.claim: Personal protective equipment includes organic gas mask, safety glasses, eyewash stations, cloth gloves, and protective clothing.
evidence.evidenceText: 8.2 Respiratory protection : Gas mask for organic gas. 8.3 Eye and face protection: Safety glasses, eyewash stations. 8.4 Hand Protection : Cloth gloves 8.5 Body Protection : Protective clothing
evidence.pageTarget: STG-3040 Exposure Controls and Personal Protection

evidence.claim: The physical appearance is gray, odor is none, solubility in water is insoluble, and specific gravity is 2.3 with water equal to 1.0.
evidence.evidenceText: 9.1 Appearance : Gray 9.2 Odor : None 9.4 Solubilith in water : Insolubale 9.10 Specific Gravity : 2.3 ( Water=1.0)

evidence.claim: The product is stable, should avoid ignition sources, and hazardous polymerization will not occur.
evidence.evidenceText: 10.1 Stavility : Stable 10.2 Conditions and material to avoid : Avoid any source of ignition. 10.4 Hazardous Polymerization : Will not occur.

evidence.claim: Disposal should follow federal, state, and local regulations, with incineration recommended in an approved incinerator.
evidence.evidenceText: 13.1 Disposal should be made in accordance with federal, state and local regulations. 13.2 Incineration recommended in approved incinerator according to federal,state and local regulations.

evidence.claim: Transport information lists Korea Act as None and External Act as None.
evidence.evidenceText: 14.1 Korea Act : None 14.2 External Act : None

evidence.claim: Regulatory information lists Waste Law as Plastics and other listed Korean and external law categories as NA.
evidence.evidenceText: 15.1 Korea Industrial Safety Agency : NA 15.2 Hazard Material Management Law : NA 15.3 KFSA : NA 15.4 Waste Law : Plastics 15.5 Others : NA 15.6 External Law - OSHA : NA - TSCA : NA - CERCLA : NA - SARA : NA - EU : NA

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is ambiguous: the document appears to be a manufacturer MSDS, while authoritySignal is general and regulatory bodies are listed mostly as NA rather than issuing authorities.
Source text has OCR or transcription quality issues, including truncated text and misspellings such as 'Keep peo', 'Solubilith', 'Insolubale', and 'Stavility'.
No standards are explicitly identified in the source text.
The header field '1.6 Prepared Date' is blank, although first prepared date, last prepared date, and revision number are provided.
